name: Seven Layer Cookie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine and pour it into a 9 x 13 pan.
2. Add the graham cracker crumbs to the melted margarine, stirring until combined.
3. Press the mixture down evenly in the pan.
4. Add the shredded coconut on top of the pressed layer.
5. Sprinkle the butterscotch chips over the shredded coconut.
6. Sprinkle the semi-sweet chocolate chips over the butterscotch chips.
7. Stir the chocolate chips and milk together until smooth, then add to the mixture.
8. Mix in the chopped pecans.
9. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
